heading: Annual meeting
label: 21304 Annual meeting
text: The corporation may hold its annual meeting in a place the members of the corporation select.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2130436:20 (3d sentence words after 2d comma)., (3d sentence words after 2d comma), .Jan. 4, 1889, ch. 2025 Stat. 640The words “members of the corporation” are substituted for “said incorporators” to reflect the probable intent.
